title: Chapter 57: Sanji and Zeff’s Starvation
main_description: Sanji and Zeff’s past is revealed in a starvation flashback, explaining why Sanji cannot refuse food to the hungry and why his debt to Zeff defines his life at the Baratie.
key_events: Sanji and Zeff are stranded after a shipwreck.
Zeff gives Sanji the food and sacrifices his own future.
The dream of an ocean restaurant becomes Sanji’s emotional burden.
